name: legion
description: Compounding entity-graph wiki for any codebase. Initialize, Document, Update, and Scan via Cursor agents (wiki-guardian + library-guardian).

enumDescriptions: Default. Shell out to `cursor agent <name> --input <path>`. Requires Cursor CLI on PATH.
Write JSON request files to `.legion/queue/`. A Cursor slash command (`/legion-drain`) processes them.
Call Claude API directly. Bypasses Cursor entirely. Requires legion.anthropicApiKey or LEGION_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.
legion.agentInvocationMode.description: How the extension invokes wiki-guardian and library-guardian.

legion.anthropicApiKey.markdownDescription: Required when `#legion.agentInvocationMode#` is `direct-anthropic-api`. For security, prefer setting via `LEGION_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` environment variable.

legion.cursorCliPath.description: Path to the Cursor CLI binary. Default `cursor` assumes it's on PATH.

legion.maxParallelAgents.description: Maximum number of agent invocations to run in parallel during Document/Update.

legion.installPostCommitHook.description: Install a post-commit git hook that queues Update on every commit. (v0.2.0+)

scripts.package: npm run snapshot && npm run compile -- --minify && vsce package --no-dependencies
